rules.name: Alcohol
rules.rule: Alcohol purchases are only permitted when dining with a customer. Customer names and business purpose must be documented.

rules.name: Tips
rules.rule: Maximum tip percentages apply for services and meals (see configured limits). Tips above threshold require manager approval.

rules.name: Corporate Card
rules.rule: No personal expenses. Only the named cardholder may use the card.

rules.name: Travel
rules.rule: Must use most cost-effective transport. Personal vehicle reimbursement at CRA km rate only.

rules.name: Parking
rules.rule: Parking fines/tickets are not reimbursable. Parking fees at business locations are allowed.
